scripts.dev: podman compose up -d 2>/dev/null || docker compose up -d && pnpm --filter @falcon/server dev
scripts.dev:down: podman compose down 2>/dev/null || docker compose down
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: podman compose up -d 2>/dev/null && vitest run integration && podman compose down 2>/dev/null
